nasb.text: It happened in the morning about the time of offering the sacrifice, that behold, water came by the way of Edom, and the country was filled with water.

esv.text: The next morning, about the time of offering the sacrifice, behold, water came from the direction of Edom, till the country was filled with water.

cnv.text: 到了早上，約在獻祭的時候，忽然有水從以東來，遍地就滿了水。

ccb.text: 次日早晨，约在献祭的时候，水从以东流来，遍地都是水。
